title: Quercetin restores oocyte maturation and embryo development in DEHP-exposed mice via mitochondrial protection and apoptosis inhibition.
main_endpoint: Oocyte maturation; embryo development; mitochondrial protection; apoptosis
review_notes: Direct DEHP-quercetin co-treatment study; strong positive benchmark for nutrient-protection extraction.

title: Congener-Specific Associations of Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances With Obesity-Metabolic Phenotypes: A Multimodel Analysis.
review_notes: Relevant human metabolic-disruption study; no nutrient intervention.

title: Structure-activity relationship of per- and Polyfluoroalkyl substances as inhibitors of human and rat 17beta-Hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase 3.
model: Human and rat enzyme / in vitro
review_notes: Mechanistic endocrine-disruption benchmark; should not be classified as a whole-animal or cohort study.

title: Per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) in early life is associated with childhood intestinal inflammation: analyses of three birth cohorts.
review_notes: Relevant human early-life exposure and gut/inflammation benchmark.

title: Association between the composite dietary antioxidant index and urinary phthalate concentrations: Evidence from NHANES 2011-2018.
review_notes: Dietary antioxidant index is associated with exposure biomarkers; not a direct protective intervention trial.

title: Protective effects of biogenic selenium nanoparticles synthesized by Chlorella Vulgaris against bisphenol a-induced metabolic disturbances in rats.
intervention: Biogenic selenium nanoparticles from Chlorella vulgaris
review_notes: Direct BPA-protection animal benchmark; should extract selenium intervention and metabolic endpoints.

title: Micro/nanoplastic-induced alterations in cellular fate and full-cycle spermatogenesis: A mechanistic review and perspective on intergenerational risks.
review_notes: Relevant review; should be flagged as review, not primary experimental evidence.

title: Microplastics, the gut microbiome and ageing: mechanisms and intervention strategies.
review_notes: Relevant review with intervention strategies; specific nutrients require full-text extraction.

title: Identification of divergent organ-specific gene and protein expression signatures for mitochondrial function, inflammatory response, and proteostasis in the liver and brain in the rotenone-induced rat model of Parkinson's disease.
main_endpoint: Mitochondrial function; inflammatory response; proteostasis; liver-brain signaling
review_notes: Relevant pesticide mechanistic animal study, but Parkinson's model context should be noted as a limitation.

title: Association between exposure to perfluoroalkyl ether sulfonate F-53B and cervical cancer risk and its mechanisms of cervical toxicity in Chinese women.
main_endpoint: Cervical cancer risk; cervical toxicity; malignant progression
review_notes: Relevant PFAS alternative study combining human association and mechanistic work.

title: Association between PFAS exposure and bilirubin metabolism: A metabolome-wide analysis in children.
review_notes: Relevant human metabolic biomarker study; choline should not be inferred unless directly tested.

title: Systemic histopathological responses to nanoplastic exposure: a review of cellular toxicity and organ-level pathology in mammalian systems.
main_endpoint: Cellular toxicity; organ-level pathology; biological barriers
review_notes: Relevant review; should be tagged as review-level evidence.

title: Cyfluthrin, atrazine, and prothioconazole alter gut bacterial diversity in Bombus terrestris (Hymenoptera: Apidae).
review_notes: Useful microbiome/ecotoxicology signal, but not a human gut hormone or metabolic-disease study.

title: Alleviation of penthiopyrad phytotoxicity in cucumber via mesoporous nano-selenium: Insights into root exudate changes and improved photosynthesis.
review_notes: Direct selenium protection, but plant model; should not be summarized as human nutrient protection.

title: Cross-scale mechanisms and molecular-ecological thresholds of phthalate stress in the cucumber-soil system.
main_endpoint: Soil system collapse threshold; plant physiology; microbiome
review_notes: Relevant environmental microbiome mechanism, but not direct human gut microbiome evidence.

title: Targeted isolation of FabG inhibitors from Koelreuteria bipinnata leaves: Mechanistic insights, synergistic antibacterial effects, and cytoprotection.
model: In vitro enzyme, docking, antibacterial, and HaCaT cell assays
main_endpoint: FabG inhibition; antibacterial synergy; oxidative cytoprotection
review_notes: Contains paraben and quercetin-derived compound, but not a direct EDC/MDC metabolic or fertility mitigation model.

title: Corrigendum to "Integrative multi-scale physiological, metabolic, and proteomic reprogramming in tomato under polyethylene microplastic stress" [Ecotoxicol. Environ. Saf. 316 (2026), 120148].
review_notes: Corrigendum should be excluded even though it contains microplastic and metabolic keywords.

title: Occurrence of per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) and their precursors in biosolids across 15 U.S. states.
review_notes: Broad exposure-monitoring record; no requested health endpoint or nutrient-protection evidence.

title: Synergistic electrocatalytic effect of hierarchical bismuth oxychloride (BiOCl) nanoparticles for voltammetric determination of 2-aminophenol in the presence of bisphenol A.
review_notes: Misleading keyword case; contains BPA but is an analytical-method paper, not toxicology evidence.

title: Tourism-associated short-term variability of large microplastics on a tropical sandy beach in the Southern Gulf of Mexico.
review_notes: Microplastic exposure keyword only; no biological, metabolic, fertility, or nutrient-protection endpoint.
